business_type: Local home cleaning service — recurring residential cleaning
current_role: Owner-operator managing bookings, customer communication, and a small cleaning team
weekly_tasks_text: Receive new booking requests by phone, WhatsApp, and website form; send price estimates based on home size and service type; schedule recurring cleaning appointments; remind customers before visits; assign jobs to cleaners; track cleaner availability; follow up after service for feedback; handle complaints or change requests; send payment reminders; post before/after photos and promotions on social media.
current_tools_text: WhatsApp Business for inquiries, Google Calendar, Gmail, Google Sheets, Wix website form, QuickBooks for invoicing, Instagram and Facebook for posts.
top_time_sinks_text: Repeating the same pricing questions to prospects; coordinating schedule changes; checking cleaner availability; manually sending reminders; chasing late payments; rewriting similar promotional posts.
error_sensitive_areas_text: Customer address and access instructions; cleaner assignment; appointment time and date; price quote accuracy; payment status; customer complaints.
customer_facing_areas_text: WhatsApp booking messages; website inquiry responses; price estimates; appointment reminders; post-service feedback requests; complaint handling; social media posts.
primary_goal_text: Respond faster to new leads and reduce scheduling chaos while keeping human control over complaints and pricing exceptions.
things_owner_refuses_to_automate_text: Serious customer complaints; final discounts or refunds; firing or replacing cleaners; entering homes without human-confirmed instructions.
